$comment: Project-local PPP binding for OpenCode. The project-local .ppp library and .opencode/plugins/ppp-local.ts are the source of truth for PPP tools in this repository.
name: Elbmesh
instructions: Use only ppp_local_* OpenCode plugin tools for PPP task bundles, validation guidance, dependency guidance, reusable PPP blocks, and repo context.
Use ppp_local_get_repo_config_offline and ppp_local_resolve_repo_context_offline when resolving this repo's local ppp.repo-config.json.
Use repoKey elbmesh when resolving PPP context for this repository. Do not call PPP MCP/API for this project.
